name: Skeeter Best
abstract: Clifton "Skeeter" Best (November 20, 1914 – May 27, 1985) was an American jazz guitarist. Best played in Philadelphia from 1935 to 1940, recording with Slim Marshall and Erskine Hawkins.

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Thompson
about_quotes.evidence: They were done with Skeeter Best, a very, very fine guitarist and Aaron Bell... and myself on piano.

about_quotes.speaker: Richard Wyands
about_quotes.evidence: Roy Haynes, George Duvivier, Skeeter Best on guitar and Frank Wess on tenor and flute on that record.
about_quotes.doc_title: Richard Wyands interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 7, 2002
